ATOPALM - Panthenol Lipcera

8
NZ$ 11.56
NZ$ 16.5129% OFF
4gUsually ships within 21 days
Shipping to New Zealand
  • Free Premium Standard Shipping with any NZ$ 70 purchase (7 - 14 business days)
  • Returns and Exchanges

Features

Benefits:

  • A Panthenol lip balm that provides high moisturization for baby’s lips and skin.

  • Contains 10000 ppm of highly concentrated Panthenol and 50000 ppm of Ceramide to calm irritated skin and offer extra care for dry lips.

  • Calm and offer deep hydration care with low irritation.

  • Infused with 5 types of amino acids and formulated with patented ingredients Omega-Ceramide-16 and Lipimoide that comfortably soothe dehydrated skin.

  • Colorless, unscented lip balm without stickiness that can be used daily.

  • Free of 10 harmful ingredients such as Alcohol and Paraben.

    • How to use:

  • Turn the container and apply it frequently on dry lips or around the mouth.

    • Major Ingredients

    Polyglyceryl-2 Triisostearate, Hydrogenated Poly (C6-14 Olefin), Phytosteryl/Isostearyl/Cetyl/Stearyl/Behenyl Dimer Dilinoleate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sorbitan Olivate, Ceresin, Myristoyl/Palmitoyl Oxostearamide/Arachamide Mea, Synthetic Wax, Panthenyl Triacetate, Bis-capryloyloxypalmitamido Isopropanol, Ectoin, N-decanoyl Serinol, Palmitoyl Palmitamide Mea, Water, 1,2-Hexanediol, Leucine, Lysine, Phenylalanine, Threonine, Valine

    Ingredients subject to change at manufacturer's discretion. For the most complete and up-to-date list of ingredients, please refer to product packaging.

    Details

    Product Information
    Imported from:South Korea
    Catalog No.:1134237520
    About brand: ATOPALM
    ATOPALM’s name guides its main philosophy, combining “ATO” in reference to sensitive skin and “PALM” for the gentle touch of hands. Founded by Dr. Park Byeong Deog, the hypoallergenic skin care brand uses its patented Multi-Lamellar Emulsion (MLE) technology to create mild but effective formulas that protect and enhance the skin’s natural barrier. ATOPALM’s most sought-after products include the MLE Cream, MLE Lotion, Maternity Care Tightening Cream and Soothing Gel Lotion. All of the brand's products are 100% made in Korea.YesStyle is an authorized retailer of ATOPALM.
    97.7%
    162

    YesStyle is an authorized retailer of ATOPALM.
